mapper.select: WITH committee AS ( -- 사업장내 위원회 조회 SELECT CONCAT(write_year, doc_no) AS target_id, doc_type AS target_type, comp_id FROM esg.tb_committee WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ), signatures AS ( -- 서명 목록 조회 (사측, 협력사측, 근로자측, 작성자, 검토자, 승인자) SELECT ai.param, json_build_object( 'hrId', ai.hr_id, 'name', ai.hr_nm, 'jobTitle', ai.jbrp_nm, 'orgName', ai.orgn_nm, 'profileImageId', f.file_id, 'signed', CASE WHEN ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END, 'signedAt', ai.updated_at ) AS signs FROM esg.tb_approval_info ai JOIN committee c ON c.target_id = ai.target_id AND c.target_type = ai.target_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file f ON f.target_type = 'hrImg' AND f.target_id = ai.hr_id AND f.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY ai.param, ai.created_at ) SELECT -- 서명 목록 조회 쿼리 본문 (SELECT json_agg(signs) FROM signatures WHERE type = 'company') AS company, (SELECT json_agg(signs) FROM signatures WHERE type = 'partner') AS partner, (SELECT json_agg(signs) FROM signatures WHERE type = 'employee') AS employee, (SELECT signs FROM signatures WHERE param = 'writer' LIMIT 1) AS writer, (SELECT signs FROM signatures WHERE param = 'reviewer' LIMIT 1) AS reviewer, (SELECT signs FROM signatures WHERE param = 'approver' LIMIT 1) AS approver FROM signatures LIMIT 1
mapper.update: WITH committee_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_committee WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ), my_user_info AS ( SELECT user_id, signature FROM esg.v_hr_info WHERE hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND signature IS NOT NULL AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1 ) UPDATE esg.tb_approval_info SET signature = (SELECT signature FROM my_user_info), updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = (SELECT user_id FROM my_user_info) WHERE target_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) -- :writer_year, :doc_type AND hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND param = #{type} -- :type 서명 타입 (company, partner, employee, writer, reviewer, approver) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM committee_exists) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM my_user_info)

WITH committee_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_committee WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ) UPDATE esg.tb_approval_info SET signature = null, updated_at = null, updated_by = null WHERE target_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) -- :writer_year, :doc_type AND hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND param = #{type} -- :type 서명 타입 (company, partner, employee, writer, reviewer, approver) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM committee_exists)
mapper.select: WITH rorat_training_participants AS ( SELECT ai.hr_id, ai.hr_nm, ai.jbrp_nm, ai.orgn_nm, f.file_id AS profile_image_id, CASE WHEN ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS signed, ai.updated_at AS signed_at FROM esg.tb_result_of_risk_assessment_training rt JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = rt.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(rt.write_year, rt.doc_no) AND ai.type = 'ATTENDEES' /* RORAT은 ATTENDEES, TRR은 attendee */ LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file f ON f.target_id = ai.hr_id AND f.target_type = 'hrImg' AND f.del_yn = 'N' WHERE rt.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND rt.write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND rt.doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND rt.doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND rt.use_yn = 'Y' ), other_training_participants AS ( SELECT ai.hr_id, ai.hr_nm, ai.jbrp_nm, ai.orgn_nm, f.file_id AS profile_image_id, CASE WHEN ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS signed, ai.updated_at AS signed_at FROM esg.tb_training_result_report t JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = t.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(t.write_year, t.doc_no) AND ai.type = 'attendee' /* RORAT은 ATTENDEES, TRR은 attendee */ LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file f ON f.target_id = ai.hr_id AND f.target_type = 'hrImg' AND f.del_yn = 'N' WHERE t.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND t.write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND t.doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND t.doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND t.use_yn = 'Y' ) SELECT hr_id AS hrId, hr_nm AS name, jbrp_nm AS jobTitle, orgn_nm AS orgName, profile_image_id AS profileImageId, signed, signed_at AS signedAt FROM rorat_training_participants UNION SELECT hr_id AS hrId, hr_nm AS name, jbrp_nm AS jobTitle, orgn_nm AS orgName, profile_image_id AS profileImageId, signed, signed_at AS signedAt FROM other_training_participants
mapper.update: WITH training_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_training_result_report WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ), my_user_info AS ( SELECT user_id, signature FROM esg.v_hr_info WHERE hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND signature IS NOT NULL AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1 ) UPDATE esg.tb_approval_info SET signature = (SELECT signature FROM my_user_info), updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = (SELECT user_id FROM my_user_info) WHERE target_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) -- :writer_year, :doc_type AND hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND param = 'attendee' -- :type 서명 타입 (company, partner, employee, writer, reviewer, approver) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM training_exists) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM my_user_info)

WITH training_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_result_of_risk_assessment_training WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ), my_user_info AS ( SELECT user_id, signature FROM esg.v_hr_info WHERE hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND signature IS NOT NULL AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1 ) UPDATE esg.tb_approval_info SET signature = (SELECT signature FROM my_user_info), updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = (SELECT user_id FROM my_user_info) WHERE target_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) -- :writer_year, :doc_type AND hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND param = 'ATTENDEES' -- :type 서명 타입 (company, partner, employee, writer, reviewer, approver) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM training_exists) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM my_user_info)

WITH trainings_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_training_result_report WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ) UPDATE esg.tb_approval_info SET signature = null, updated_at = null, updated_by = null WHERE target_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) -- :writer_year, :doc_type AND hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND param = 'attendee' -- :type 서명 타입 (company, partner, employee, writer, reviewer, approver) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM trainings_exists)

WITH trainings_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_result_of_risk_assessment_training WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ) UPDATE esg.tb_approval_info SET signature = null, updated_at = null, updated_by = null WHERE target_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) -- :writer_year, :doc_type AND hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND param = 'ATTENDEES' -- :type 서명 타입 (company, partner, employee, writer, reviewer, approver) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM trainings_exists)
mapper.select: WITH committee AS ( SELECT CONCAT(write_year, doc_no) AS target_id, doc_type AS target_type, comp_id FROM esg.tb_committee WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ), signatures AS ( -- 서명 목록 조회 (사측, 협력사측, 근로자측, 작성자, 검토자, 승인자) SELECT ai.param, json_build_object( 'hrId', ai.hr_id, 'name', ai.hr_nm, 'jobTitle', ai.jbrp_nm, 'orgName', ai.orgn_nm, 'profileImageId', f.file_id, 'signed', CASE WHEN ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END, 'signedAt', ai.updated_at ) AS signs FROM esg.tb_approval_info ai JOIN committee c ON c.target_id = ai.target_id AND c.target_type = ai.target_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file f ON f.target_type = 'hrImg' AND f.target_id = ai.hr_id AND f.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY ai.param, ai.created_at ) SELECT -- 서명 목록 조회 쿼리 본문 (SELECT signs FROM signatures WHERE param = 'writer' LIMIT 1) AS writer, (SELECT signs FROM signatures WHERE param = 'reviewer' LIMIT 1) AS reviewer, (SELECT signs FROM signatures WHERE param = 'approver' LIMIT 1) AS approver FROM signatures LIMIT 1

WITH training AS ( SELECT CONCAT(write_year, doc_no) AS target_id, doc_type AS target_type, comp_id FROM esg.tb_result_of_risk_assessment_training WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ), signatures AS ( -- 서명 목록 조회 (사측, 협력사측, 근로자측, 작성자, 검토자, 승인자) SELECT ai.param, json_build_object( 'hrId', ai.hr_id, 'name', ai.hr_nm, 'jobTitle', ai.jbrp_nm, 'orgName', ai.orgn_nm, 'profileImageId', f.file_id, 'signed', CASE WHEN ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END, 'signedAt', ai.updated_at ) AS signs FROM esg.tb_approval_info ai JOIN training c ON c.target_id = ai.target_id AND c.target_type = ai.target_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file f ON f.target_type = 'hrImg' AND f.target_id = ai.hr_id AND f.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY ai.param, ai.created_at ) SELECT -- 서명 목록 조회 쿼리 본문 (SELECT signs FROM signatures WHERE param = 'writer' LIMIT 1) AS writer, (SELECT signs FROM signatures WHERE param = 'reviewer' LIMIT 1) AS reviewer, (SELECT signs FROM signatures WHERE param = 'approver' LIMIT 1) AS approver FROM signatures LIMIT 1

WITH training AS ( -- 사업장내 위원회 조회 SELECT CONCAT(write_year, doc_no) AS target_id, doc_type AS target_type, comp_id FROM esg.tb_training_result_report WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ), signatures AS ( -- 서명 목록 조회 (사측, 협력사측, 근로자측, 작성자, 검토자, 승인자) SELECT ai.param, json_build_object( 'hrId', ai.hr_id, 'name', ai.hr_nm, 'jobTitle', ai.jbrp_nm, 'orgName', ai.orgn_nm, 'profileImageId', f.file_id, 'signed', CASE WHEN ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END, 'signedAt', ai.updated_at ) AS signs FROM esg.tb_approval_info ai JOIN training c ON c.target_id = ai.target_id AND c.target_type = ai.target_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file f ON f.target_type = 'hrImg' AND f.target_id = ai.hr_id AND f.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY ai.param, ai.created_at ) SELECT -- 서명 목록 조회 쿼리 본문 (SELECT signs FROM signatures WHERE param = 'writer' LIMIT 1) AS writer, (SELECT signs FROM signatures WHERE param = 'reviewer' LIMIT 1) AS reviewer, (SELECT signs FROM signatures WHERE param = 'approver' LIMIT 1) AS approver FROM signatures LIMIT 1
mapper.update: WITH committee_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_committee WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ), my_user_info AS ( SELECT user_id, signature FROM esg.v_hr_info WHERE hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND signature IS NOT NULL AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1 ) UPDATE esg.tb_approval_info SET signature = (SELECT signature FROM my_user_info), updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = (SELECT user_id FROM my_user_info) WHERE target_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) -- :writer_year, :doc_type AND hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND param = #{type} -- :type 서명 타입 (company, partner, employee, writer, reviewer, approver) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM committee_exists) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM my_user_info)

WITH training_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_training_result_report WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ), my_user_info AS ( SELECT user_id, signature FROM esg.v_hr_info WHERE hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND signature IS NOT NULL AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1 ) UPDATE esg.tb_approval_info SET signature = (SELECT signature FROM my_user_info), updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = (SELECT user_id FROM my_user_info) WHERE target_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) -- :writer_year, :doc_type AND hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND param = #{type} -- :type 서명 타입 (company, partner, employee, writer, reviewer, approver) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM training_exists) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM my_user_info)

WITH training_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_result_of_risk_assessment_training WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ), my_user_info AS ( SELECT user_id, signature FROM esg.v_hr_info WHERE hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND signature IS NOT NULL AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1 ) UPDATE esg.tb_approval_info SET signature = (SELECT signature FROM my_user_info), updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = (SELECT user_id FROM my_user_info) WHERE target_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) -- :writer_year, :doc_type AND hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND param = #{type} -- :type 서명 타입 (company, partner, employee, writer, reviewer, approver) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM training_exists) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM my_user_info)

WITH committee_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_committee WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ) UPDATE esg.tb_approval_info SET signature = null, updated_at = null, updated_by = null WHERE target_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) -- :writer_year, :doc_type AND hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND param = #{type} -- :type 서명 타입 (company, partner, employee, writer, reviewer, approver) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM committee_exists)

WITH trainings_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_result_of_risk_assessment_training WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ) UPDATE esg.tb_approval_info SET signature = null, updated_at = null, updated_by = null WHERE target_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) -- :writer_year, :doc_type AND hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND param = #{type} -- :type 서명 타입 (company, partner, employee, writer, reviewer, approver) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM trainings_exists)

WITH trainings_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_training_result_report WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ) UPDATE esg.tb_approval_info SET signature = null, updated_at = null, updated_by = null WHERE target_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) -- :writer_year, :doc_type AND hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND param = #{type} -- :type 서명 타입 (company, partner, employee, writer, reviewer, approver) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM trainings_exists)
mapper.select: SELECT ai.hr_id AS hrId, ai.hr_nm AS name, ai.jbrp_nm AS jobTitle, ai.orgn_nm AS orgName, f.file_id AS profileImageId, ai.signature IS NOT NULL AS signed, ai.updated_at AS signedAt FROM esg.tb_toolboxmeeting t JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON t.write_year = #{writeYear} AND t.doc_type = #{docType} AND t.doc_no = #{docNo} AND t.use_yn = 'Y' AND ai.target_type = #{docType} AND ai.target_id = #{writeYear} || #{docNo} AND ai.type = 'attend' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file f ON f.target_type = 'hrImg' AND f.target_id = ai.hr_id AND f.del_yn = 'N'
